message:
feat: add shell completions for all CLI arguments

Comprehensive shell completion support using clap's ArgValueCompleter:

Static completers for fixed value sets:
- status_completer: open, in_progress, blocked, deferred, closed, etc.
- issue_type_completer: task, bug, feature, epic, chore, docs, question
- priority_completer: 0-4 and P0-P4 with descriptions
- dep_type_completer: blocks, parent-child, related, etc.
- sort_key_completer: priority, created_at, updated_at, title
- csv_fields_completer: id, title, description, status, priority, etc.

Dynamic completers that read from .beads/issues.jsonl:
- issue_completer: suggests issue IDs with title and status hints
- label_completer: extracts unique labels from all issues
- assignee_completer: extracts unique assignees from all issues
- owner_completer: extracts unique owners from all issues

Completion index caching:
- CompletionIndex struct holds parsed issues and extracted metadata
- OnceLock<CompletionIndex> ensures single parse per shell session
- build_completion_index() reads JSONL and builds all lookup tables

Delimited variants for comma-separated arguments:
- status_completer_delimited, issue_type_completer_delimited,
  priority_completer_delimited for --status, --type, --priority flags
  that accept comma-separated lists

Updated commands: list, count, dep add/list/tree, label add/remove/rename,
audit label, and all filter flags throughout the CLI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
